title: Conecsus
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/conecsus-llc/358895914 Conecsus LLC is a global "green" metals recycler and refiner founded in 1980 and headquartered in Terrell, Texas. The company specializes in processing complex industrial residues and electronic wastes, particularly those containing tin, lead, silver, gold, and copper, such as SMT solder and solder paste wastes. Recognized as the largest secondary tin-lead recycler in the Western Hemisphere, Conecsus converts these materials into reusable metal products using state-of-the-art technology.
